name: An Abandoned Music Shop
description:
You are in a small music store.  The shelves are barren and empty, and dust has
settled upon the floor.  The sound of passing elves outside is muted through
the thick wooden walls of this flet.  The sound of weeping draws your
attention, and you realize that this shop is not, in fact, abandoned.  The
proprietor sits on the floor in the corner crying softly.
